item.title: UB: write access without borrow tag
item.body:
```diff
 #[ostd::ktest::miri_main]
 fn kernel_main() {
     println!("Hello world from guest kernel!");
+    let task =
+        ostd::task::TaskOptions::new(|| ostd::miri_println!("A custom task from miri_main!"))
+            .spawn()
+            .unwrap();
+    ostd::miri_println!("miri_main task schedule_info={:?}", task.schedule_info());
 }
```

comments.body:
Adding a yield_now still triggers the ub, but slightly changes the backtrace (`ostd::task::processor::after_switching_to` is called after `__ostd_main` in this case)
```diff
ostd::miri_println!("miri_main task schedule_info={:?}", task.schedule_info());
+ostd::task::Task::yield_now();
```

```
    let task =
        ostd::task::TaskOptions::new(|| ostd::miri_println!("A custom task from miri_main!"))
            .build()
            .unwrap();
```

Simply construction a task triggers the ub:

so look like heap allocations in miri_main are not properly handled.

```
VecDeque::buffer_write (ptr::write) ← Miri 报错点
    ↓ VecDeque::push_back_mut
        ↓ VecDeque::push_back (标准库)
            ↓ RcuMonitor::after_grace_period (monitor.rs:79)
                ↓ RcuDrop::drop (rcu/mod.rs:518-520)
                    ↓ PageTableFrag::drop
                        ↓ KVirtArea::drop
                            ↓ Task::drop
```

```diff
-type Callbacks = VecDeque<Box<dyn FnOnce() + Send + 'static>>;
+type Callbacks = VecDeque<u8>;
```

Results in the same ub error

But for ZST element, the error is gone

```diff
-type Callbacks = VecDeque<Box<dyn FnOnce() + Send + 'static>>;
+type Callbacks = VecDeque<()>;
```

`core::mem::MaybeDangling::<alloc::collections::btree::node::LeafNode<u32, ostd::arch::irq::HwCpuId>>::new`

```rust
// alloc::collections::btree::node::LeafNode
struct LeafNode<K, V> {
    parent: Option<NonNull<InternalNode<K, V>>>,
    parent_idx: MaybeUninit<u16>,
    len: u16,
    keys: [MaybeUninit<K>; 11],
    vals: [MaybeUninit<V>; 11],
}
```


`K=u32`, `V=HwCpuId(u32)=u32`, the size of [`LeafNode`](https://std.noratrieb.dev/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/alloc/collections/btree/node/struct.LeafNode.html) is `100` bytes (=0x68)

When `V=HwCpuId(u8)=u8`, the size is `72` bytes (=0x0x48), and the range changes:

```rust

    |
220 |             ptr::write(ptr, value);
    |             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ this error occurs as part of an access at alloc2346980[0x48..0x49]
    |
    = help: this indicates a potential bug in the program: it performed an invalid operation, but the Stacked Borrows rules it violated are still experimental
    = help: see https://github.com/rust-lang/unsafe-code-guidelines/blob/master/wip/stacked-borrows.md for further information
help: <5641125> was created by a Unique retag at offsets [0x0..0x48]
   --> /home/zjp/.rustup/toolchains/nightly-2026-07-14-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/lib/rustlib/src/rust/library/core/src/mem/maybe_dangling.rs:81:23
    |
 81 |         MaybeDangling(x)
    |                       ^
    = note: this is on thread `main`
```
